channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: The stakes of a peace deal for Iran
item.description: Iran remains defiant against U.S., but stands to rake in billions if a peace deal can be reached.
item.content:encoded: Iran remains defiant against U.S., but stands to rake in billions if a peace deal can be reached.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Northam

item.title: On the streets of Paris, hearts were divided as France beat Morocco in the World Cup
item.description: France beat Morocco to advance to the World Cup semifinals. The match drew crowds to Paris' streets to watch on big screens. In a country with a large Moroccan diaspora, many hearts were divided.
item.content:encoded: France beat Morocco to advance to the World Cup semifinals. The match drew crowds to Paris' streets to watch on big screens. In a country with a large Moroccan diaspora, many hearts were divided.
item.dc:creator: Eleanor Beardsley

item.title: Why India and China, two of the largest countries, didn't have World Cup teams
item.description: The world's two most populous countries — India and China — are missing from the expanded 48-team men's World Cup, highlighting corruption, bureaucratic rot and youth sports culture.
item.content:encoded: The world's two most populous countries — India and China — are missing from the expanded 48-team men's World Cup, highlighting corruption, bureaucratic rot and youth sports culture.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Pak

item.title: Cyclospora outbreaks grow in the Midwest
item.description: Michigan reports 1,250 cases of cyclospora and CDC surveillance shows cases in 17 states. The CDC has initiated a traceback investigation, as the source is not yet known.
item.content:encoded: Michigan reports 1,250 cases of cyclospora and CDC surveillance shows cases in 17 states. The CDC has initiated a traceback investigation, as the source is not yet known.
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey

item.title: Novelist Tana French serves as literary guide for Dublin
item.description: Fiction provides it's own kind of travel — right from your couch. NPR's Mary Louise Kelly talks with Irish writer Tana French about her books and others' writing that immerse readers in Ireland.
item.content:encoded: Fiction provides it's own kind of travel — right from your couch. NPR's Mary Louise Kelly talks with Irish writer Tana French about her books and others' writing that immerse readers in Ireland.
item.dc:creator: Elena Burnett

item.title: Wally Funk, who waited six decades to reach space, dies at 87
item.description: Pilot Wally Funk has died at 87. Denied the chance to become a NASA astronaut, she finally reached space at age 82 aboard a Blue Origin flight.
item.content:encoded: Pilot Wally Funk has died at 87. Denied the chance to become a NASA astronaut, she finally reached space at age 82 aboard a Blue Origin flight.
item.dc:creator: Kathryn Fink

item.title: Poor counties adjust to cuts in food stamp program
item.description: Poor counties in the South are bracing for steep cuts in administering food aid as President Trump's tax and spending bill brings new requirements.
item.content:encoded: Poor counties in the South are bracing for steep cuts in administering food aid as President Trump's tax and spending bill brings new requirements.
item.dc:creator: Nick de la Canal

item.title: Terry Tempest Williams on what it means to be a woman with a big voice and big ideas
item.description: Terry Tempest Williams writes about what is easy to overlook – she calls it "the holy ordinary." She spoke with Wild Card's Rachel Martin about being present and her new book, The Glorians.
item.content:encoded: Terry Tempest Williams writes about what is easy to overlook – she calls it "the holy ordinary." She spoke with Wild Card's Rachel Martin about being present and her new book, The Glorians.

item.title: Utah judge now considering evidence against accused killer of Charlie Kirk
item.description: A weeklong hearing to establish whether the accused killer of conservative activist Charlie Kirk can be taken to full trial ended today. There has been dramatic testimony.
item.content:encoded: A weeklong hearing to establish whether the accused killer of conservative activist Charlie Kirk can be taken to full trial ended today. There has been dramatic testimony.
item.dc:creator: Sean Higgins

item.title: Trump dismisses election commissioners, his latest step to shape voting
item.description: President Trump has removed the remaining three members of the bipartisan U.S. Election Assistance Commission. Here's what it means.
item.content:encoded: President Trump has removed the remaining three members of the bipartisan U.S. Election Assistance Commission. Here's what it means.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Lopez
